name: layout-qa
description: Use Layout local QA protocol checks and remote GitHub PR checks for frontend changes.

interface.shortDescription: Run local and PR frontend QA checks.
interface.longDescription: Layout QA helps Codex set up repo-local frontend QA protocol files, run local browser checks, add remote GitHub PR checks, inspect generated screenshots and HTML reports, serve deterministic mock API scenarios, and report concrete visual, UX, and state issues from the active coding session.
defaultPrompt: Set up Layout QA for this app.
Run Layout QA for this frontend change.
Inspect the latest Layout QA report.
